control_awareness: Aware that amount requires department head approval under control P2P-C-001 and pre-PO approval is mandatory under P2P-C-003. Segregation of duties prevents self-approval under P2P-C-002.
expected_control_effect: Triggers department head approval and prevents premature issuance of purchase order without approval.
overall_reason: Given the quarter-end budget consumption pressure and the amount exceeding the manager approval threshold, creating a single purchase request routed normally is appropriate. This respects all preventive controls, initiates the necessary approvals, and aligns with the requester’s objectives to use budget before period closes while not circumventing required approvals.
reason: The purchase amount of 1,750,000 exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold requiring department head approval. Creating a single purchase request now initiates the approval process respecting control rules and ensures the service can be obtained before the quarter-end deadline.
